content.text: Manual changes were made to support Docker-based development and testing.
Summary of manual changes in the repo folder:

1. .env.example: Added SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE and updated SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL for Docker.
2. docker-compose.yml: Set SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE and updated datasource URL for Docker.
3. application.yml: Changed to use H2 as default DB, added default values for credentials and AES key.
4. application-docker.yml: New file for Docker profile datasource config.
5. API_tests/run_api_tests.sh: Now runs tests in a Docker container using Maven image.
All changes were made manually to enable seamless local and Docker-based development and testing.

base_instructions.text: Document manual changes for Docker support.
